title: MIKASA Sorrento Champagne Flute Glasses, Set of 4 Ridged Crystal Glasses, 200ml Sparkling Wine Stemmed Glass Set, Elegant Glassware for Weddings, Parties, Celebrations, Drinkware Gift Set
features: MULTI USE: Set of 4 glasses, ideal for serving Champagne, Prosecco or sparkling wine at weddings, parties, or celebrations
ELEGANT RIBBED DESIGN: Each 200ml champagne flute features a refined ribbed pattern in clear crystal, adding a sophisticated visual texture
BEAUTIFUL FINISH: Finished with a delicate gold rim that adds a luxurious touch and catches the light beautifully
HIGH QUALITY GLASS: Champagne glasses crafted from the finest 100% lead-free crystal for clarity, quality, and safety
GIFT READY: Thoughtful gift set for hosts, drink enthusiasts, or home entertainers, elegantly presented in a striking, high-quality gift box
QUALITY GUARANTEED: Covered by Mikasa's 10-Year Guarantee for added confidence and long-lasting enjoyment
description: From the manufacturer Style your Mikasa, your way With Mikasa, there’s no one-size-fits-all formula. Ranges blend and accessories flourish. A complete tableware offering designed for who we are today and tomorrow. Encompassing UK design and expressing coordination in styles that suit all. Make Mikasa the beating heart of your home. Mikasa Sorrento Ridged Crystal Champagne Flute Glasses, Set of 4, 200ml The Mikasa Sorrento 4pc Champagne Flute Glass Set is a timeless complement to any refined setting and is ideal for celebrations and special occasions. Each 200ml glass features a wide shape and is embellished with a delicate gold rim on top, which is reflected under the light. Made from the finest 100% lead-free crystal, this flute glass set ensures durability and strength. Complete your collection of Mikasa Sorrento glassware by adding matching tumblers and wine glasses. More information: Made from 100% lead-free crystal glass Capacity: 200ml Length 6.6cm, height 24cm Hand-wash only Glassware that Glistens From Champagne flutes and tumblers to stemless wine glasses, discover different finishes and shapes to make each glass set look unique. Luxury Crystal Good tipples only deserve the best glassware, which is why all of the Mikasa drinkware collections are made from the finest European crystal. Get the Look The look is everything. From the bold to the refined, discover stunning dining sets, table linen and cutlery collections to style your Mikasa, your way. Timeless Gifting Looking for a perfect gift for newlyweds or first-home buyers? You’re in luck with these Mikasa sets, as they arrive in sustainable, drop-test-ready gift packaging. Mikasa Glassware When raising a glass, make it that bit extra special with Mikasa's stunning new glassware collection. With ranges inspired by iconic Italian cities such as Palermo and Sorrento, you'll find streamlined silhouettes, glistening crystal and elegant finishing touches to impress.
